body:
## Sprint ID
S07-github-pr-protocol-automation

## Objective
Implement Open PR Handling Protocol in-engine with GUI-visible status, deterministic stop conditions, codex-thread resolution, and operator-grade receipts using migration-resilient canonical root discovery.

## Whitelist + Budgets
- Whitelist touched: `docs/backlog/**`, `docs/sprints/README.md`, `docs/sprints/S07/**`, `src/**`, `scripts/**`
- Max net new lines in any single existing file: 120 (met)
- Max touched file total LOC: 1200 (met)
- Max function length: 80 lines (met)

## Touched Files
- docs/backlog/README.md
- docs/sprints/README.md
- docs/sprints/S07/README.md
- docs/sprints/S07/evidence/*
- src/s07/open_pr_protocol.ts
- src/s07/open_pr_protocol.test.ts
- scripts/s07-open-pr-protocol.ts

## AT Checklist
- [x] AT-S07-01: Unrelated open PR inventory path triggers deterministic STOP with explicit reason.
- [x] AT-S07-02: Readiness gate fail path reports exact failing JSON condition IDs.
- [x] AT-S07-03: Codex unresolved thread flow resolves via GraphQL in fixture-driven run.

## Evidence Paths
- Durable evidence root: `docs/sprints/S07/evidence/`
- Canonical preflight + prune/fsck: `docs/sprints/S07/evidence/02_primary_worktree_preflight_after_remediation.txt`, `docs/sprints/S07/evidence/03_repo_preflight_after_remediation.txt`
- Open PR inventory: `docs/sprints/S07/evidence/03_open_pr_inventory.json`
- Gates: `docs/sprints/S07/evidence/07_gates_verify_final.txt`, `docs/sprints/S07/evidence/07_gates_gates_sh_final.txt`
- Stoplight signatures: `docs/sprints/S07/evidence/10_stoplight_greps.md`
- AT receipts: `docs/sprints/S07/evidence/at/AT-S07-01.md`, `AT-S07-02.md`, `AT-S07-03.md`
- Protocol live receipts: `docs/sprints/S07/evidence/live/s07_protocol_result_env.json`, `s07_protocol_result_git.json`

## Minimal JSON Receipt References
- `docs/sprints/S07/evidence/live/s07_protocol_result_env.json`
- `docs/sprints/S07/evidence/live/s07_protocol_result_git.json`
- `docs/sprints/S07/evidence/03_open_pr_inventory.json`

## Notes
- Merge path is implemented but gated by `operatorApprovedMerge=true`; default remains `false`.
title: [S07] chore : GitHub PR protocol automation
